libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test runtime/system properties for the generated tests: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves through vertx-core:5.0.1 to Netty 4.2.2.Final, and the existing 5.0.0 test already documents the same Netty 4.2.x Java 25 native-run requirement but gates it only on libraryVersion == '5.0.0'. Meaningful coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer plus WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient; no external service is normally required. Avoid OAuth2WebClient coverage unless intentionally adding the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If the generated build keeps the existing version-specific guard, GVM_TCK_LV=5.0.1 will skip the Netty runtime properties and can reproduce the native-image run failure.
OAuth2WebClient references optional OAuth2 types; tests that import that API without adding io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 will fail to compile.
Vert.x clients, servers, files, and Vertx instances must be closed in tests to avoid hanging event-loop resources.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker image is needed for normal Vert.x Web Client coverage, but native-image runs for 5.0.1 still need the Netty unsafe-access runtime system properties on JDK 25.
